title: Keystone Consumer Config
description: Top-level keystone.json at the consumer repo root. Declares the nested plugin tree and pins the framework version. Plan §3 spells out the precedence semantics (pre-order walk, project layer always at the front, strict locks downward). Phase 3 will finalize the schema alongside the vendoring flow; this draft captures the shape committed to in Phase 1.

version.description: Schema version of keystone.json itself. Currently "1".

framework_version.description: Keystone binary version this project is pinned to (SemVer).

plugins.description: Ordered list of plugin nodes. Pre-order walk produces the cascade priority list. The implicit project layer (harness/) always sits at the front before the first node here.

budgets.description: Optional per-port context-budget caps. Phase 5 wires these into keystone doctor --budget.

name.description: Plugin name. Must match the manifest's name.

source.description: Plugin source. v1 supports git+<url>; local-path may follow as an opt-in for plugin authors (PLAN §6 open question 2).

version.description: Plugin version pin (tag, branch, or SHA after the # in the source URL — captured here for readability).

strict.description: Per-port lock list. Blocks descendants/later-tree siblings from shipping the named items.

children.description: Child plugins nested under this one. Pre-order walk descends before moving to siblings.
